name: Homebase Scheduling API
what_it_does: Free employee scheduling, time tracking, and team communication platform with REST API — designed for small businesses with hourly workers, offering free tier for unlimited employees, shift scheduling, time clock, and hiring tools.
use_cases: Automating shift schedule creation for hourly employees via API
Syncing time clock punch data to payroll processing systems
Querying employee hours worked for payroll calculation
Managing time-off requests and availability via API integration
Building scheduling automation for multi-location small businesses
not_for: Salaried or remote knowledge worker scheduling
Enterprise workforce management with complex compliance tracking
Project-based time tracking for client billing
best_when: A small business with hourly workers (restaurants, retail, services) wants free or low-cost scheduling with basic API access for payroll integration.
avoid_when: You need advanced analytics, complex multi-location management, or enterprise integrations beyond basic payroll sync.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow for third-party integrations. API key option for direct access. Partner program required for production OAuth2 apps. No fine-grained scopes — full account access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: unlimited employees, 1 location, basic scheduling and time tracking
pricing.paid_tiers: Essentials from $20/location/month; Plus from $48/location/month; All-in-One from $80/location/month
pricing.notes: Generous free tier for single location. Location-based pricing (not per-employee) — good value for small teams. US-based. Strong SMB focus — restaurants, retail, healthcare. API access on paid plans. Integrates with Gusto, ADP, Square, QuickBooks for payroll.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; documented in partner program

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for schedules, employees, time clock, and payroll data. OAuth2 for integrations. No webhooks — must poll for data changes. Partner program required for OAuth2 app registration. Documentation less comprehensive than When I Work or Deputy.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Employee management idempotent by ID. Shift creation not idempotent. Time punch records append-only. Read operations idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: No webhooks — polling required for real-time data sync
OAuth2 partner program approval needed before production use
Location-centric data model — all data scoped under location IDs
Free tier limitations may affect API access capabilities

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US data residency. OAuth2 for integrations. No scope granularity. Standard security for SMB scheduling tool.
